formulas.monthlyNetProfit: monthlyRevenue - operationalCosts - (otherFeesMonthly + monthlyRevenue * royaltyRate / 100 + monthlyRevenue * marketingFeeRate / 100)
formulas.breakEvenMonths: initialInvestment / (monthlyRevenue - operationalCosts - (otherFeesMonthly + monthlyRevenue * royaltyRate / 100 + monthlyRevenue * marketingFeeRate / 100))

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
